anthropics-skills.trustNotes: Source of truth. Production-grade, maintained by Anthropic engineers. Document skills battle-tested in production.
anthropics-skills.securityNotes: Safest available. Document skills are proprietary/source-available. No arbitrary code execution in example skills.

voltagent-awesome.description: A curated collection of 1000+ agent skills from official dev teams and the community, compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and more.
voltagent-awesome.trustNotes: High signal. 'Official dev team' badge means the skill is maintained by the library's own team — meaningful accountability. Best starting point for engineering skills.
voltagent-awesome.securityNotes: Official team skills have higher accountability but still review scripts. Community-contributed skills have a lower bar.

k-dense-scientific.description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.
k-dense-scientific.trustNotes: Best-in-class security posture for a community repo. Cisco scanner on every contribution. Clear distinction between K-Dense-authored vs community skills.
k-dense-scientific.securityNotes: Community contributions less thoroughly reviewed. Run scanner locally: `skill-scanner scan /path/to/skill`. Skills make external DB API calls.
k-dense-scientific.installCmd: See README — uses uv package manager

alirezarezvani.description: 232+ Claude Code skills & agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory.
alirezarezvani.trustNotes: High stars = community validation, not security audit. Stdlib-only Python is a meaningful plus — no pip supply chain risk. Broad scope means quality varies.
alirezarezvani.securityNotes: Stdlib-only Python tools are safer. Still review SKILL.md before production. Compliance skills: validate against actual regulatory requirements.

orchestra-research.description: Comprehensive open-source library of AI research and engineering skills for any AI model. Package the skills and your claude code/codex/gemini agent will be an AI research agent with full horsepower. Maintained by Orchestra Research.
orchestra-research.trustNotes: Highly specialised. Quality high within ML research domain. Autoresearch skill makes autonomous network requests — review carefully.
orchestra-research.securityNotes: Installs GPU-heavy ML packages. Autoresearch makes external web requests. Run in isolated environment first.

travisvn-awesome.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows — particularly Claude Code
travisvn-awesome.trustNotes: Good starting list for Claude-specific skills. Active maintenance. Honest risk disclosure.
travisvn-awesome.securityNotes: Lists Superpowers experimental lab skills separately — good practice.

composio-awesome.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows
composio-awesome.trustNotes: Composio has a legitimate product. Action skills introduce OAuth flows — additional trust surface.
composio-awesome.securityNotes: Action skills send data to external APIs. Check Composio data retention policy.

skillmatic-awesome.description: The definitive resource for Agent Skills - modular capabilities revolutionizing AI agent architecture
skillmatic-awesome.trustNotes: Meta-list, not a skill collection. High value for orientation and ecosystem mapping.
skillmatic-awesome.securityNotes: Links to external resources — apply normal web hygiene.

behisecc-awesome.description: A curated list of Claude Skills.
behisecc-awesome.trustNotes: Security skills are high-stakes — VibeSec appears well-regarded. DNA/health skills touch sensitive data.
behisecc-awesome.securityNotes: DNA/health skills process sensitive personal data. Review data handling carefully.

glebis-skills.description: Collection of Claude Code skills for enhanced AI workflows
glebis-skills.trustNotes: Niche but high-quality within consulting/knowledge-management. Single author — maintenance depends on one person.
glebis-skills.securityNotes: NotebookLM skill uses notebooklm-py — review API key handling. Obsidian integration reads local vault files.

agentskills-io.trustNotes: Canonical spec. Use it to validate your own SKILL.md files and understand what any third-party skill can/cannot do.
agentskills-io.securityNotes: Governance site, not a skill repo. No security risk.

skillsmp.trustNotes: Aggregator, not curator. Almost no individual vetting. Use only as discovery layer — always review the source repo before installing.
skillsmp.securityNotes: ⚠ High risk. Aggregates everything with ≥2 stars. Malicious skills can execute arbitrary code. Always review SKILL.md and scripts.

lobehub.trustNotes: Better curation than SkillsMP. LobeHub has a track record in OSS AI tooling. Still community-sourced — verify before production.
lobehub.securityNotes: Provides a skill-vetter skill. Remote skill.md loading is mild supply-chain risk — pin to a commit hash.

agentskill-sh.trustNotes: Two-layer scanning adds value over pure aggregators. Still large volume — catches obvious issues but not sophisticated attacks.
agentskill-sh.securityNotes: Two-layer scan (static + LLM review). Better than nothing. Don't treat a passing scan as a green light.

skills-sh.trustNotes: Popularity ≠ safety. Use as discovery only.
skills-sh.securityNotes: No explicit security scanning mentioned. Treat like SkillsMP.

superpowers.trustNotes: Jesse Vincent is trusted in OSS. Lab skills explicitly warned as experimental. Community-editable = variability. Pin to specific commits.
superpowers.securityNotes: Community-editable repo = supply chain risk. Lab skills may break. Not for production without pinning.

mcollina-skills.trustNotes: Author has exceptional domain credibility — skills about tools he maintains. High signal for Node.js/Fastify ecosystem work.
mcollina-skills.securityNotes: Low risk — instruction-only skills from a trusted OSS maintainer.

duckdb-skills.trustNotes: Maintained by the DuckDB team — maximum domain authority.
duckdb-skills.securityNotes: DuckDB can read arbitrary local files and remote storage. Standard DuckDB security considerations apply.

vercel-skills.trustNotes: Vercel Labs maintaining their own skills is a strong trust signal. Reflects Vercel's own best practices.
vercel-skills.securityNotes: Skills deploy to Vercel infrastructure — ensure secrets are not embedded in SKILL.md.
